completedItems: Read vivo AIGC docs and documented chat/OCR/ASR endpoints, auth, request/response shapes and limitations.
Added vivo provider status/auth/error/client/chat/OCR/ASR adapter files.
Rewired OCR/ASR/LLM resolvers to prefer vivo and expose explicit fallback/missing-env state.
Added /api/ai route guard using E01 requireDemoSession and scope helpers.
Updated health material parsing to expose provider status, extracted text, save parse result and create consultation through E01 APIs.
Removed fake OCR/ASR success for image/audio without real provider.
Added E05 Playwright verification and product:ai provider smoke.
remainingItems: Run real vivo provider smoke after VIVO_APP_KEY/VIVO_APP_ID/ASR runtime metadata are configured.
E06 can reuse ASR interface for browser SpeechRecognition and voice-ball UI.
PDF OCR and webm ASR remain unavailable until vivo docs confirm support or a conversion/provider path is added.
fixedFindings: Legacy /api/ai/* routes now perform server-side demo session auth before generating, parsing or transcribing.
Health material image/PDF without real OCR no longer returns fake success.
Teacher audio upload without real ASR no longer fabricates a transcript.
browserUseEvidence: Browser Use skill was attempted but in-app browser runtime was blocked by local node_repl Node version v22.20.0 requiring >= v22.22.0.
Used Playwright fallback for E05 targeted verification.

checks.featureSmoke: timed out after 364s; observed existing D08 failures in communication/director/visual-only smoke artifacts, not E05 targeted flow

risks: Current environment has no vivo env configured, so real external provider smoke was not executed.
Some legacy /api/ai/* business responses still keep their old success payload shape for compatibility, while auth/provider errors use E01 error envelope.
Full feature smoke remains affected by pre-existing D08 smoke failures from earlier product-completion work.
notes: E05 targeted Playwright passed on http://127.0.0.1:3331. npm run lint and npm run build passed. npm run product:ai passed with missing-env status.
